title: Sorghum riedelii
intro: Sorghum riedelii, also known as Marama, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia and a member of the grass family. This plant is valued for its numerous health benefits, which include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The bioactive constituents of Sorghum riedelii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are marketed for their potential to support cardiovascular health and reduce inflammation.
